---
name: Bug
about: Something in the templates, install scripts, or skill behavior broke
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
<!-- One or two sentences. Paste the command + the error if there is one. -->

**What you expected**
<!-- One sentence. -->

**Where it broke**
- [ ] In a template file (`templates/...`) — which one:
- [ ] In `docs/install.sh` (user-level installer)
- [ ] In `docs/add.sh` (project-level installer)
- [ ] In the skill content itself (`SKILL.md` / `MANIFESTO.md`)
- [ ] On the landing page (`docs/index.html` / `manifesto.html`)

**Environment**
- OS / distro:
- AI tool (Claude Code / Cursor / Copilot / …) + version:
- Anything else relevant (Caddy version, Litestream version, Go version):

**Repro**
<!-- Smallest repro you have. Even an approximate sequence of steps helps. -->
